sutta: once when the exalted 1 was dwelling near kimbela in the bamboo grove the verbal kimbila visited him and after saluting sat down at 1 side so seated he spoke thus to the exalted 1 lord what is the cause what is the reason whereby when the exalted 1 has passed away completely true dharma sadhama does not become long lasting the buddha said suppose qimbila after that has passed away completely the monks and nuns lay disciples both men and women live without reverence without he without respect for the teacher without respect without heed for dhamma without respect without heed for sangha for the training without respect without heat for 1 another this is the cause this is the reason whereby when the tata gata has passed away completely true dhamma does not become long lasting at what lord is the cause the reason whereby after the tatar gather has passed away true dhamma becomes long-lasting suppose qimbila monks and nuns lay men and lay women disciples respect and give heat to the teacher the dhamma the sangha the training reveal and give heat to 1 another this is the cause the reason whereby when the tata gata has passed away true dhamma becomes long lasting that's the end of the suta
commentary: this is 1 of the sutas which tries to say why the true dhamma discourses of the buddha does not last long here is saying that the first 3 and without respect for the the buddha the dharma and the sangha without respect for the buddha means probably that instead of falling uh recognizing our buddha people revere other buddhas instead of acknowledging our teacher is the buddha we look to others other other beings to respect as the teacher without reverence for the dhamma is that we don't take the dhamma vinaya as our teacher in the suttas the buddha said now we should take the dhamma vinaya as our teacher we should always try to learn what is in the dhamma and the vinaya and be heedful of the teachings there the third 1 is no respect for the sangha there might be uh some reason for this perhaps uh some people they they the the sangha perhaps might not be practicing well i might not keep the precepts very well and people lose respect for the sangha and that would cause a decline but we have to remember we lay people are supposed to support the sangha to keep the sasana buddha's asana going so the buddha said if in the future even if those who wear the yellow ropes are corrupt still if you support the sangha then the merit is still very great because you help to perpetuate the sangha uh by helping to perpetuate the sangha even if at a certain time the sangha is corrupt it is possible later on that arahants will still be around whereas if you don't support the sangha the sangha is terminated cut off then and there is not possible for good monks to appear later no reverence for the training is the training of the monks life keeping the precepts etc and without heat for 1 another is we don't we don't live in harmony if we don't live in harmony that is 1 cause for the true dharma to pass away there are other reasons given in other sutas but uh this uh let's just stop here for the moment number
